notes: Tests touch real Apify and Serper APIs. Each eval costs ~$0.02-$0.10 of Apify free credit and ~$0.001 of Serper. Use --dry-run for tests that don't need to verify Sheets writes.

evals.name: find-3-leads-bishkek-manicure
evals.prompt: Найди 3 клиентов в Бишкеке в сфере маникюр/косметология. Запиши в таблицу https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/194zVZg90O9B586E9XvdSlvKj2ojAyPn8pReJu53RgBQ/edit
evals.expected_output: Agent should ask for confirmation showing source-status JSON. After confirmation, runs the search pipeline and reports 3 leads appended to the sheet. All 3 should have either phone or instagram. Status = success.

evals.name: missing-sheet-prompt-ask
evals.expected_output: Agent must NOT start the pipeline. Must ask the user to provide a Google Sheets link before proceeding.

evals.name: dedup-blocks-second-run
evals.prompt: Найди ещё 3 клиентов в Бишкеке в маникюре, в ту же таблицу https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/194zVZg90O9B586E9XvdSlvKj2ojAyPn8pReJu53RgBQ/edit
evals.expected_output: Should show source-status with leads_already_in_db_for_slice > 0 (assuming eval 1 ran first), then proceed to find 3 NEW leads not matching the previously-stored twogis_ids.

evals.name: clean-requires-double-confirmation
evals.prompt: Очисти базу лидов для Бишкека маникюр
evals.expected_output: Agent must ask the user to confirm TWICE before calling run.py clean. Must spell out the count of leads that will be deleted.
